
'''Rice Bowl''' is a snack item that gives you 0.5 hunger points.{{Item
| name = 
| image = Edamame unpodded.png
| id = edamame_unpodded
| type = Food
| Subtype = Soy
| Properties = Hunger points: 0.5/10
| stackable = 64
| Description = Itadakimasu!
}}

Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
==Obtaining==
===Right-clicking Edamame===
You can get 2-3 of these when right-clicking [[Edamame]].

==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
*Be careful when loading these in [[Pack Puppy]] Inventory or [[Food Bowl]], your dogs might snack them all!
